calendar.matters:
Report Of Sale And Petition For Order Confirming Sale Of Real Property
Off Calendar Nov-08-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nancy Rasch for and with Debra Dolch.

The sale was confirmed at $1,895,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed October 11, 2018. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to receipt and review of the revised order). The amount of the additional bond is to be determined by Counsel.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
